Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Noah and Kendra had a yearlong fling, but when he finally visited her, she had a baby and claimed he was the father! Marvin and Rainy have been married for almost 6 years, but two weeks ago, she received a call saying that Marvin had cheated on her!
Video.title: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Image.alt: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Video.summary: Kelsey says her husband is abusing her. Malcolm believes that Kelsey has been cheating on him since the beginning and that their two kids may belong to another man. Plus, Carrie's boyfriend Chris thinks their child belongs to her ex.
Video.title: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Image.alt: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Video.summary: Vanessa reveals a hidden secret from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to see if he fathered Mel’s son!
Video.title: A Shocking Statement

Image.alt: A Shocking Statement
A Shocking Statement
A Shocking Statement

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough

Image.alt: Steve's Had Enough
Steve's Had Enough
Steve's Had Enough

Video.summary: After 10 years of searching, Brenda will reunite with her kids and address abuse allegations. Then, Cassidy wed Paul 5 days after she split with PJ, but is he molesting her and PJ’s son? Or is PJ the monster who burned their son’s feet?
Video.title: "I'm Terrified of the Results"

Image.alt: "I'm Terrified of the Results"
"I'm Terrified of the Results"
"I'm Terrified of the Results"

Video.summary: Davonna believes that her husband Michael never abused her son. Her son told his dad Brandon that Michael punched him in the nose and back. Then, Evie wants to prove that she never abused her son and deserves custody of him from her mother!
Video.title: My Son Said You Beat Him

Image.alt: My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him

Video.summary: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be a prostitute. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!
Video.title: A Shocking Betrayal

Image.alt: A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal

Video.summary: Chante’s daughter accused Danae of sexual abuse. Although Danae was cleared by the authorities, Chante’s mother Shelly never believed her innocence. But is Danae just covering up for her own lies? Did Chante’s mother sleep with her ex-husband?
Video.title: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Image.alt: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Video.summary: Jennifer fears that her husband Tim is addicted to teenage porn and has heard rumors of him sneaking underage girls into their house. Is Amanda’s man a child molester and peeping Tom? How will these wives react to the lie detector test results?
Video.title: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Image.alt: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Video.summary: David believes his wife Shamonda is cheating on him and that she might be having sex for money! Plus, Matt believes that his girlfriend is a prostitute. She admits she has accepted money and gifts from men, but swears she gave nothing in return.
Video.title: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Image.alt: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Video.summary: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.
Video.title: The Lighter Side of Steve

Image.alt: The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve

Video.summary: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.
Video.title: I Need Answers Now

Image.alt: I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now

Video.summary: Colleen's son, Dalton has suffered with cancer for ten years. Patrick, the boy's father, left the picture when Dalton was only an infant, and after falling on hard times ended up homeless. But now he wants to be back in Dalton's life.
Video.title: Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Image.alt: Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Video.summary: Secrets revealed ... Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. On their wedding day, she first learned that he had lied about his age and was only 18 years old, much younger than she. She also came to learn he was verbally and physically abusive. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth, and she's making a final decision on her misleading relationship.
Video.title: Not A Big Shocker

Image.alt: Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker
Not A Big Shocker

Video.summary: Troy admits to sleeping with Kela’s friend during “a break”. Now that they're together, is he sleeping around?
Video.title: Stop Running Off My Stage!

Image.alt: Stop Running Off My Stage!
Stop Running Off My Stage!
Stop Running Off My Stage!

Video.summary: Shauna reveals to her fiance that stripping wasn't enough and she began prostituting.
Video.title: I've Been Prostituting, Is My Fiance The Father?

Image.alt: I've Been Prostituting, Is My Fiance The Father?
I've Been Prostituting, Is My Fiance The Father?
I've Been Prostituting, Is My Fiance The Father?

Video.summary: Jason believes his girlfriend has been cheating.
Video.title: Liars And Scammers Exposed

Image.alt: Liars And Scammers Exposed
Liars And Scammers Exposed
Liars And Scammers Exposed

Video.summary: The forum continues! Steve’s hosting a teen girl town hall. No topics are off limits.
Video.title: Teen Girls: Tough Topics 2

Image.alt: Teen Girls: Tough Topics 2
Teen Girls: Tough Topics 2
Teen Girls: Tough Topics 2

Video.summary: Justin thinks Lainie cheated and doubts their kid's paternity. Steven doubts whether Ashley's child is his.
Video.title: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?

Image.alt: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?

Video.summary: Jennifer spent years tracking down her biological mother and when she finally did, she her mother’s husband, Rodney, drove them apart after she turned him down. Refusing to lose her mother again, she turns to Steve for help!
Video.title: Mom, Who Do You Believe?

Image.alt: Mom, Who Do You Believe?
Mom, Who Do You Believe?
Mom, Who Do You Believe?

Video.summary: Jeremiah says that his 14-year-old female client’s mom agreed to the tattoo near her private area.
Video.title: My Husband Tattooed a 14 Year Old Girl

Image.alt: My Husband Tattooed a 14 Year Old Girl
My Husband Tattooed a 14 Year Old Girl
My Husband Tattooed a 14 Year Old Girl

Video.summary: Shane suspected that Toni cheated on her after she came home with a damaged car.
Video.title: I Have a Confession, I Was Never Pregnant

Image.alt: I Have a Confession, I Was Never Pregnant
I Have a Confession, I Was Never Pregnant
I Have a Confession, I Was Never Pregnant

Video.summary: After finding porn and several email and text exchanges with transsexuals, Quintiqua is demanding that her boyfriend prove if he is bi-sexual or not! Then, Herb dug up proof in the form of pictures of Carl and a woman named Deanna online.
Video.title: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Image.alt: Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?
Do You Have A Gay Double Life?

Video.summary: Bobby and Amber are being accused of neglecting and abusing their three children. Then, Kyle believes that his mother-in-law Kristie may be coaching his kids to say that he molested them.
Video.title: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Image.alt: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Video.summary: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!
Video.title: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Image.alt: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Image.alt: She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: Perry and Stephanie started having an affair while Ashley was at rehab. Now Ashley is here to confront Perry for not taking responsibility for their daughter. Then, after they split up, Amanda started accusing James' new girlfriend of being abusive.
Video.title: Angry Moms Confront

Image.alt: Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront

Video.summary: Mindy wants Michael to step up to the plate, be a father, and help support his child. His new girlfriend Tanya also wants Michael to be involved in his child's life, but after hearing the lie detector results, she too might question her man.
Video.title: I Want Him To Love Me

Image.alt: I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me
I Want Him To Love Me

Video.summary: Maurice wants to prove to that he’s faithful. Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi’s cheating accusations!
Video.title: Steve Saw Right Through You

Image.alt: Steve Saw Right Through You
Steve Saw Right Through You
Steve Saw Right Through You

Video.summary: Kendra says her boyfriend makes her feel like a prisoner in her own home and accuses her of seducing neighbors through the window; Keisha believes that her husband cheats on her when he is at work.
Video.title: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Image.alt: I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home
I'm a Prisoner in My Own Home

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
